name: Real Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine yeast and warm milk until dissolved.
3. Add flour, sugar, cocoa, egg, butter, and vanilla; mix until just combined.
4. Shape dough into a loaf and place in greased bread pan.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise until doubled in size (about 1 hour).
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack before slicing.
